name: Engram
focus: v0.1.3 live. OpenClaw export command shipped (engram export --format openclaw). Ian using Engram as harness for custom OpenClaw bot. Next: cross-platform loaders, content marketing.
description: Personal AI infrastructure — the bridge between domain expertise and AI power. Audience: Domain Translators. Engram authors skills, OpenClaw runs them, Vouch verifies them.
